steps.title: Set the upper limit
steps.content:
The third side is shorter than the sum:
$$x\lt8+13$$
$$x\lt21$$

steps.title: Set the lower limit
steps.content:
The longer side is shorter than the other two:
$$13\lt8+x$$
$$5\lt x$$

steps.title: Combine the limits
steps.content: Both restrictions must hold, so $5\lt x\lt21$. The answer is C.
